name: claude-advisor
description: A research-backed guide to everything Claude: the surfaces (Claude.ai chat, Claude Code, Claude Cowork), model selection (Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku), the ecosystem (plugins, MCP servers, tools), building with the API, plans and pricing, and a clear 'which one should I use for this task' decision framework. Every load-bearing claim is grounded in a NotebookLM synthesis of 237 cited 2026 sources.
